question: 统计全部订单的销售总额
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order

question: 一共有多少笔订单
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM fact_order

question: 统计华北地区的销售总额
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_region r ON f.region_id = r.region_id WHERE r.region_name = '华北'

question: 按大区统计销售额，并按销售额从高到低排序
gold_sql: SELECT r.region_name, ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_region r ON f.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.region_name ORDER BY total_sales DESC

question: 销售额最高的前三个商品品类是什么
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_product p ON f.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 3

question: 苹果品牌商品的销售额是多少
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_product p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.brand = '苹果'

question: 手机数码品类一共卖出了多少件商品
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(f.order_quantity) AS total_quantity FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_product p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = '手机数码'

question: 黄金会员贡献了多少销售额
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_customer c ON f.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.member_level = '黄金'

question: 女性客户下了多少笔订单
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_customer c ON f.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.gender = '女'

question: 统计2025年2月的销售总额
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_date d ON f.date_id = d.date_id WHERE d.year = 2025 AND d.month = 2

question: 按月份统计2025年一季度的销售额
gold_sql: SELECT d.month, ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_date d ON f.date_id = d.date_id WHERE d.year = 2025 AND d.quarter = 'Q1' GROUP BY d.month ORDER BY d.month

question: 按大区统计平均订单金额
gold_sql: SELECT r.region_name, ROUND(AVG(f.order_amount), 2) AS avg_order_amount FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_region r ON f.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.region_name ORDER BY avg_order_amount DESC

question: 统计2025年第一季度每个大区销售额最高的商品品类及其销售额
gold_sql: SELECT t.region_name, t.category, t.total_sales FROM (SELECT r.region_name, p.category, ROUND(SUM(f.order_amount), 2) AS total_sales, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.region_name ORDER BY SUM(f.order_amount) DESC) AS rn FROM fact_order f JOIN dim_region r ON f.region_id = r.region_id JOIN dim_product p ON f.product_id = p.product_id JOIN dim_date d ON f.date_id = d.date_id WHERE d.year = 2025 AND d.quarter = 'Q1' GROUP BY r.region_name, p.category) t WHERE t.rn = 1
